ticketTitle: Run the full test suite (go test ./... -count=1), fix any regressions in existing tests that assumed all languages produce full dimension sets or non-N/A grades, and ensure the build compiles cleanly.

deliverables.objective: Create language_tiers_test.go to verify the analyzer registry returns nil for Swift and non-nil for each supported language, and that the certifier emits N/A for unsupported-language units.
nonGoals: Do not modify production analyzer registry code
Do not add a Swift analyzer
Do not introduce new features or scoring dimensions
Do not refactor unrelated test files
deliverables.planText: Create internal/engine/language_tiers_test.go to lock in the analyzer-registry contract: verify ForLanguage returns nil for swift (unsupported), non-nil for go/ts/js/py/rs (supported), and that certifier yields N/A grade for swift units. This is the foundational contract test — all other behavior depends on the registry correctly classifying languages.

deliverables.objective: Add N/A-grade test expectations to scorer_test.go so unsupported-language units are explicitly tested for N/A output rather than accidentally passing with misleading F grades.
nonGoals: Do not modify production scoring logic in scorer.go or certifier.go
Do not change existing passing assertions for supported languages
Do not introduce new test fixtures or testdata files
deliverables.planText: Update internal/engine/scorer_test.go with N/A-grade expectations for unsupported-language units. After the language-tier split, units in unsupported languages receive N/A (not score-0→F). Add test cases that explicitly assert N/A grade output so the scoring layer's contract for unsupported languages is verified.

deliverables.objective: Add unsupported-banner and unsupported-exclusion test cases to report_test.go so the report layer's handling of unsupported-language units is explicitly verified.
nonGoals: Do not modify production report rendering in card.go or full.go
Do not change existing passing report assertions
Do not introduce new report templates or formats
deliverables.planText: Update internal/report/report_test.go with unsupported-banner and unsupported-exclusion test cases. Add assertions that the card renderer displays an unsupported-language banner when such units are present, and that the full report's aggregate scoring (buildLanguageDetail) excludes unsupported-language records from score calculations.
